ticket.subject: [SERIOUS PROLBEM PLEASE HELP GUYS]
ticket.description:
Hi Guys,

The [GENERATE LABEL & FULFIL] stopped working this morning for us when we first tried.  

It was fine end of day yesterday.

The issue is happening on all our multicarrier computers, usps and fedex so it is the APP .

Shipping label no longer automatically prints.  

We must manually [PRINT DOCUMENTS] then print label.

Please see if you did a code update that broke this... we need this fixed please ASAP.

UPS, FedEx, Stamps USPS accounts connected

Actively using app for both rates and labels

$200 custom plan 3

Call summary:
Customer reporting GENERATE LABEL & FULFIL (i.e. SLGP) is not printing labels automatically. The customer reported this problem started today and it was working yesterday

Customer (Reggie) is going on vacation and wants to fix this case

comments.body:
We need assistance from the L3 team regarding the case below.

Case: Touchless print not working

Details:
When labels are generated using Generate Label & Fulfill (SLGP), the labels are not printing automatically. The labels are being generated successfully, and the order is fulfilled.

The customer is able to print labels manually using the Print Documents option, but automatic printing is not working as it did previously.
This was working until yesterday but has stopped working today.

The customer is available anytime before 9:00 PM Pacific Time (9:30 AM IST) and has requested a callback within this window if possible.

Could you please check and provide your input?

Store Details:
Store URL – rugged-race-products.myshopify.com
Account ID – ec7136eb-95e8-437b-a415-b61d2fc684e9

FYI, discussed this case with Vimal

Next Steps:
QA/Product team to test this case before the call with the customer on 9:30 AM IST
